description: Composition Olive green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Flaunt your urban cool with this Levi's T-shirt that combines ethnic patterns on an uber-cool design. This tee is tailored to a beautiful finish, and is designed to offer a snug Fit that flaunts your chiseled body. Slip into richly hued jeans and sneakers, and throw on a tonal jacket to complement this trendy T-shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
